summary: Frontend-only testing completed for landing page integration. All 10 requested features verified and working correctly. Landing page now displays at root URL (/) with complete GITB branding, navigation flows work correctly between Landing → Login → Admin Dashboard, and Landing → Apply page.
passed_tests: Landing page displays at root URL (/) with GITB branding
Hero section shows 'Europe's Best Innovative Online School' headline
Hero section shows 'Now Enrolling for 2025 Cohort' badge
Header contains GITB logo, Home, Schools, Why GITB, Programs navigation
Header has Login button [data-testid='header-login-btn'] navigating to /login
Header has Apply Now button [data-testid='header-apply-btn'] navigating to /apply
Schools section shows 5 school cards (Engineering, Data, Product, Creative Economy, Business)
Trending Programs section fetches courses from API
Stats section shows 10,000+ Graduates, 15+ Programs, 4+ Countries, 98% Satisfaction
Footer shows EAHEA Accredited badge, Schools, Programs, Company, Resources links
Footer shows contact email: admissions@gitb.lt
Login page [data-testid='login-page'] accessible via /login route
Login page shows GITB logo linking to / (landing page)
Login page has '← Back to Website' link pointing to / (landing page)
Login page shows EAHEA Accredited badge with 'EU & International Recognition'
Login flow works with admin credentials (admin@unilms.edu / admin123)
Admin redirected to /admin/dashboard after successful login
Apply page [data-testid='apply-page'] accessible via /apply route
Apply page shows EAHEA Accredited badge with 'European Union & International Recognition'
Apply page has 3-step wizard (1: Personal Info, 2: Program & Documents, 3: Payment)
Apply page Step 1 has all form fields (First Name, Last Name, Email, Phone, Country, City)
Apply page Step 2 fetches 9 programs from API
Apply page Step 2 has High School Certificate and ID Document upload fields

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 10 requested features verified and working

context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page integration into main frontend is complete. Key routes: / (Landing), /login (Login), /apply (Application), /admin/dashboard (Admin). All navigation flows work correctly. Programs API fetches 9 courses for Apply page dropdown and 5 for Trending Programs section on landing page.

landing_page_at_root.description: Landing page displays at root URL (/) with GITB branding, hero, schools, stats, footer sections

login_button_navigation.description: Login button in header navigates to /login page

login_logo_links_to_landing.description: GITB logo on login page has href='/' linking back to landing page

login_back_to_website.description: '← Back to Website' link on login page has href='/' and navigates to landing page

login_eahea_badge.description: Login page shows EAHEA Accredited badge with 'EU & International Recognition'

apply_now_navigation.description: Apply Now button in header navigates to /apply page

apply_3_step_wizard.description: Apply page has 3-step wizard: Personal Info → Program & Documents → Payment

apply_eahea_badge.description: Apply page shows EAHEA Accredited badge at top

apply_programs_from_api.description: Apply page fetches 9 programs from /api/courses/public API

admin_login_redirect.description: Admin login with admin@unilms.edu / admin123 redirects to /admin/dashboard

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/apply_step2.png - Apply page Step 2 with program dropdown
